# Curator Tools

## Overview

gSage AI ‚Äî Curator reputation lists (read) tool.

## Tools in this group

| Tool | Summary | Permissions | Requires approval | Core |
| --- | --- | --- | :---: | :---: |
| `curator_lists` | Read reputation list data (IPs, domains, hashes) from the Curator microservice | `curator:read` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `curator_manage` | Add, remove, and manage entries in Curator reputation lists and collections | `curator:write` | ‚úì | ‚Äî |

## Configuration

> The JSON below goes into the **configtool model** in the web UI (per organisation; can also be scoped to a department).

> **Sensitive fields** (api keys / passwords / tokens) are *omitted* from the JSON below ‚Äî set them via environment variables (see the _Environment variables_ table) or directly in the encrypted DB row from the web UI.

### Empty configtool template (required fields only)

```json
{}
```

### Example configtool model

```json
{
  "api_key": "<value>",
  "base_url": "http://curator:8000"
}
```

### Field reference

| Field | Type | Required | Sensitive | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | :---: | :---: | --- | --- |
| `api_key` | `string` | ‚Äî | ‚úì | ‚Äî | Curator admin API key (X-API-Key header). |
| `base_url` | `string` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | `"http://curator:8000"` | Curator service base URL (default: http://curator:8000). |

## Environment variables

The variables below are derived automatically from each tool's `config_schema`. Set them in your `.env` (or via your secrets backend) to seed defaults for every organisation. **Per-org DB config takes precedence over env vars.**

| Variable | Maps to field | Type | Default | Sensitive | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
| `TOOL_CURATOR__API_KEY` | `api_key` | `string` | ‚Äî | ‚úì | Curator admin API key (X-API-Key header). |
| `TOOL_CURATOR__BASE_URL` | `base_url` | `string` | `"http://curator:8000"` | ‚Äî | Curator service base URL (default: http://curator:8000). |

_Note: any field above can also be overridden per-tool by using the prefix `TOOL_<TOOL_NAME>__` instead of the shared `TOOL_<NAMESPACE>__` ‚Äî useful when a single tool in the family needs a distinct value._

## Operations

### `curator_lists`

- **`list_collections`** ‚Äî list all reputation list collections

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `active_only` | `boolean` | ‚Äî | Used with list_collections. If true, return only active collections (default: false). |
  | `published_only` | `boolean` | ‚Äî | Used with list_collections. If true, return only published collections (those exposed via the public /data/ HTTP endpoints; default: false). When omitted or false, both published and private collections are returned (the 'published' flag is included in each collection object so the agent can tell them apart). |

- **`view_items`** ‚Äî query items inside a specific collection (requires collection_id)

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `collection_id` | `integer` | ‚Äî | Collection ID. Required for view_items. |
  | `value` | `string` | ‚Äî | Used with view_items. Filter by exact value (IP address, domain, hash, etc.). |
  | `item_type` | `string` | ‚Äî | Used with view_items. Filter by item type: blocklist, allowlist, or suspected. |
  | `created_from` | `string` | ‚Äî | Used with view_items. Lower bound (inclusive) for the item's created_at. Accepts ISO 8601 with TZ or YYYY-MM-DD (interpreted as UTC). |
  | `created_to` | `string` | ‚Äî | Used with view_items. Upper bound (inclusive) for the item's created_at. Same format as created_from. |
  | `expire_from` | `string` | ‚Äî | Used with view_items. Lower bound (inclusive) for the item's expire_at. Excludes never-expiring items unless never_expires=true is also set. |
  | `expire_to` | `string` | ‚Äî | Used with view_items. Upper bound (inclusive) for the item's expire_at. Excludes never-expiring items unless never_expires=true is also set. |
  | `created_within_days` | `integer` | ‚Äî | Used with view_items. Shortcut: keep only items created within the last N days from now (UTC). ANDed with created_from/to if both supplied. |
  | `expires_within_days` | `integer` | ‚Äî | Used with view_items. Shortcut: keep items that will expire within the next N days. Implicitly excludes never-expiring entries. |
  | `never_expires` | `boolean` | ‚Äî | Used with view_items. If true, return only items with no expiry (permanent). If false, exclude them. If omitted, no filter on this dimension. |
  | `expired_only` | `boolean` | ‚Äî | Used with view_items. If true, return only items whose expire_at is already in the past (expired but not yet pruned by the cleanup task). |
  | `export_csv` | `boolean` | ‚Äî | Used with view_items. When true, fetch all matching items (up to 10 000) and ship them as a downloadable CSV artifact in addition to the inline preview. A CSV is also produced automatically whenever the total exceeds per_page. |
  | `group_by` | `array` | ‚Äî | Used with view_items. Columns to aggregate in the top-N summary. Defaults to ['type'] when omitted. Common values: type, public_reference, reference. |


### `curator_manage`

- **`add_items`** ‚Äî add one or more entries to a collection (requires collection_id, items)

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `collection_id` | `integer` | ‚Äî | Target collection ID. Required for add_items, del_item, and update_collection. Use curator_lists action=list_collections to discover IDs. |
  | `items` | `array` | ‚Äî | List of items to add. Required for add_items. Each item must have 'value' and 'item_type'. Optionally 'public_reference', 'reference', 'expire_days'. |

- **`import_csv`** ‚Äî bulk-add entries from a stored CSV file (requires collection_id, file_id)

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `file_id` | `string` | ‚Äî | UUID of the stored CSV file to import. Required for action=import_csv. The CSV must have a header row with the columns: value (required), item_type, public_reference, reference, expire_days. |
  | `default_item_type` | `string` | ‚Äî | Used with import_csv. Fallback item_type applied to rows that have an empty/missing 'item_type' column. |
  | `default_public_reference` | `string` | ‚Äî | Used with import_csv. Fallback public_reference applied to rows that omit it. |
  | `default_reference` | `string` | ‚Äî | Used with import_csv. Fallback reference applied to rows that omit it. |
  | `default_expire_days` | `integer` | ‚Äî | Used with import_csv. Fallback expire_days applied to rows that omit it. Omit for permanent entries. |
  | `dry_run` | `boolean` | ‚Äî | Used with import_csv. When true, validate the CSV and return projected counts (would_add / invalid_rows) without calling the Curator service. |

- **`del_item`** ‚Äî remove an entry from a collection (requires collection_id, value, item_type)

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `collection_id` | `integer` | ‚Äî | Target collection ID. Required for add_items, del_item, and update_collection. Use curator_lists action=list_collections to discover IDs. |
  | `value` | `string` | ‚Äî | Entry value to remove. Required for del_item. |
  | `item_type` | `string` | ‚Äî | Item type to remove. Required for del_item. |

- **`create_collection`** ‚Äî create a new reputation list (requires short_description, collection_type)

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `short_description` | `string` | ‚Äî | Short label for the collection (max 100 chars). Required for create_collection. Together with subtype and collection_type this forms the auto-generated slug. |
  | `collection_type` | `string` | ‚Äî | Type of entries this collection holds. Required for create_collection. Valid values: ip, cidr, domain, url, domain_regex, file_hash_md5, file_hash_sha1, file_hash_sha256, email, asn, ja3, ja4. |
  | `subtype` | `string` | ‚Äî | Optional subtype label (max 20 chars). Used for create_collection. Example: 'smtp_servers', 'exit_nodes', 'tor'. Included in slug generation. |

- **`update_collection`** ‚Äî update collection metadata (requires collection_id)

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `collection_id` | `integer` | ‚Äî | Target collection ID. Required for add_items, del_item, and update_collection. Use curator_lists action=list_collections to discover IDs. |
  | `description` | `string` | ‚Äî | Detailed description of the collection. Used for create/update_collection. |
  | `active` | `boolean` | ‚Äî | Whether the collection is active (default: true). Inactive collections are not dumped. Used for create/update_collection. |
  | `published` | `boolean` | ‚Äî | Whether the collection is exposed via the public /data/ HTTP endpoints (default: true). When false, the collection is hidden from public listings AND its dump files are not generated, but the collection remains fully usable via the admin API (curator_manage / curator_lists). Use 'published=false' for agent-only / private lists. Used for create/update_collection. |

| `curator_lists` | `curator:read` |
| `curator_manage` | `curator:write` |
